leadText: Chlorophyll (Japanese: ようりょくそ Chlorophyll) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During harsh sunlight , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Chlorophyll has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During harsh sunlight , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts attack frequency if the weather is sunny. MD T D S Raises the number of moves the Pokémon attempts per turn when it is sunny. B S L ひざしがつよい てんきだと こうげきかいすうが あがる MD GtI In sunny weather, it can use a move 2 times at once for only 1 PP. * When the Pokémon uses a move in the Sunny weather condition, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! * S MD When the Pokémon uses a move when it's sunny, it uses the move 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! MD RT DX When the Pokémon uses a move during Sunny weather or in Extremely Harsh Sunlight, it uses the move 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use.
